nasb.text: Now it came about, as soon as Isaac had finished blessing Jacob, and Jacob had hardly gone out from the presence of Isaac his father, that Esau his brother came in from his hunting.

esv.text: As soon as Isaac had finished blessing Jacob, when Jacob had scarcely gone out from the presence of Isaac his father, Esau his brother came in from his hunting.

cnv.text: 以撒給雅各祝福完了，雅各剛剛從他父親以撒那裡出來的時候，他哥哥以掃就打獵回來了。

ccb.text: 雅各接受了以撒的祝福才刚离开，他的哥哥以扫就打猎回来了。

csbs.text: 以撒祝福完雅各，雅各刚从父亲以撒面前离去，他哥哥以扫就打猎回来了。
